parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 3.1.0 Get Participant Callback Details

box "ML API Adapter Service" #LightBlue
    control "ML-API-ADAPTER" as ML_API_ADAPTER
end box

box "Central Services" #LightYellow
    boundary "Central Service API" as Central_Service_API
    control "Participant Handler" as Participant_Handler
    entity "Participant DAO" as Participant_DAO
    database "Central Store" as Central_Store
end box

group Get Callback Details
    ML_API_ADAPTER -> Central_Service_API: 1 Request to get callback details - GET - /participants/{name}/endpoints?type={typeValue}
    activate ML_API_ADAPTER
    activate Central_Service_API

    Central_Service_API -> Participant_Handler: 2 Fetch Callback details for Participant
    activate Participant_Handler

    Participant_Handler -> Participant_DAO: 3 Fetch Participant\n<font color=red>Error code: 3200</font>
    activate Participant_DAO

    Participant_DAO -> Central_Store: 4 Fetch Participant
    activate Central_Store
    note right of Central_Store: participant
    Central_Store --> Participant_DAO: 5 Retrieved Participant
    deactivate Central_Store

    Participant_DAO --> Participant_Handler: 6 Return Participant
    deactivate Participant_DAO

    Participant_Handler -> Participant_Handler: 7 Validate DFSP

    alt Validate participant (success)
        Participant_Handler -> Participant_Handler: 8 check if "type" parameter is sent

        alt Check if "type" parameter is sent (Sent)
            Participant_Handler -> Participant_DAO: 9 Fetch Callback details for Participant and type\n<font color=red>Error code: 3000</font>
            activate Participant_DAO

            Participant_DAO -> Central_Store: 10 Fetch Callback details for Participant and type
            activate Central_Store
            note right of Participant_DAO
                Condition:
                isActive = 1
                [endpointTypeId = <type>]
            end note
            note right of Central_Store: participantEndpoint
            Central_Store --> Participant_DAO: 11 Retrieved Callback details for Participant and type
            deactivate Central_Store

            Participant_DAO --> Participant_Handler: 12 Return Callback details for Participant and type
            deactivate Participant_DAO
            note right of Participant_Handler #Yellow
                Message:
                {
                  endpoints: {type: <type>, value: <value>}
                }
            end note

            Participant_Handler --> Central_Service_API: 13 Return Callback details for Participant
            Central_Service_API --> ML_API_ADAPTER: 14 Return Callback details for Participant

        else Check if "type" parameter is sent (Not Sent)
            Participant_Handler -> Participant_DAO: 15 Fetch Callback details for Participant\n<font color=red>Error code: 3000</font>
            activate Participant_DAO

            Participant_DAO -> Central_Store: 16 Fetch Callback details for Participant
            activate Central_Store
            note right of Participant_DAO
                Condition:
                isActive = 1
            end note
            note right of Central_Store: participantEndpoint
            Central_Store --> Participant_DAO: 17 Retrieved Callback details for Participant
            deactivate Central_Store

            Participant_DAO --> Participant_Handler: 18 Return Callback details for Participant
            deactivate Participant_DAO
            note right of Participant_Handler #Yellow
                Message:
                {
                  endpoints: [
                    {type: <type>, value: <value>},
                    {type: <type>, value: <value>}
                  ]
                }
            end note

            Participant_Handler --> Central_Service_API: 19 Return Callback details for Participant
            Central_Service_API --> ML_API_ADAPTER: 20 Return Callback details for Participant
        end

    else Validate participant (failure) / Error
        note right of Participant_Handler #Red
            Validation failure/ Error!
        end note
        note right of Participant_Handler #Yellow
            Message:
            {
              "errorInformation": {
                "errorCode": <errorCode>,
                "errorDescription": <ErrorMessage>,
              }
            }
        end note
        Participant_Handler --> Central_Service_API: 21 Return <font color=red>Error code: 3000, 3200</font>
        deactivate Participant_Handler
        Central_Service_API --> ML_API_ADAPTER: 22 Return <font color=red>Error code: 3000, 3200</font>
        deactivate Central_Service_API
        deactivate ML_API_ADAPTER
    end
end
@enduml
```
